did.unittitle: New York State College of Human Ecology Department of Policy Analysis and Management records

origination.label: creator

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Human Service Studies

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Consumer Economics and Housing

did.abstract: Course material, reports, committee meeting minutes, plans and proposals concerning the Department of Policy Analysis and Management and material relating to the merger of the Department of Human Service Studies and Consumer Economics and Housing.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Peter Martinez, March 2004 Daniel W. Young, October 2010

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: In 1998, the Department of Consumer Economics and Housing and the Department of Human Service Studies merged to become the Department of Policy Analysis and Management.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Course material, reports, committee meeting minutes, plans and proposals concerning the Department of Policy Analysis and Management and material relating to the merger of the Department of Human Service Studies and Consumer Economics and Housing. Includes videotapes with Policy Analysis and Management faculty appearances: Jennifer Tiffany, "Talking with Kids About AIDS"; Andrea Parrot on Larry King Live; Roger Battistella on health care reform.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIAL
relatedmaterial.p: Additional material and digital versions can be found online here: http://ecommons.library.cornell.edu/handle/1813/531

emph.ref: Series I. Reports, Plans and Proposals
Series IV. Faculty Material: Meeting Minutes, Memos, Grants

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: See also New York State College of Human Ecology Department of Consumer Economics and Housing records #23-23-2864
See also New York State College of Human Ecology Department of Human Service Studies records #23-24-2894
See also College of Human Ecology records #23-2-2817

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Human Ecology Department of Policy Analysis and Management records, #23-26-3006. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Series I. Reports, Plans and Proposals
Diaz Proposal - partnership between Cornell and Florida International University
Folders 2 and 3 formerly contained Faculty Annual Reports - these contents are now in Box 7
Department Review - Consumer Economics and Housing and Human Service Studies correspondence
CLASP-transfer of CLASP from Policy Analysis and Management to the Department of Education-correspondence
Strategic Plan and External Review material- draft
Response to Recommendations of the 2002 Review of Policy Analysis and Management
Academic Plan for the creation of Policy Analysis and Management

Proposal - Justification and Proposed Model for a Graduate Program in PAM; Proposal from State Education Department to change M.S. and PhD degree titles from Human Service Studies to Policy Analysis and Management, 2000
Policies on Space, Administrative Structure, Teaching Assistants and Phones
Policies on Smith-Lever, Voting, Travel, and Income
Proposal for a Visiting Fellows Program
"An Investigation into the Feasibility of Raising the School-Leaving Age in New York State"-Rosemary Avery, Laura Colosi, Jerome Ziegler
The Long Island Opening Adoption's Door to Teen Project Final Evaluation Report - evaluation conducted by Rosemary Avery

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: See additional faculty reports in electronic format in collection #23-2-2817

did.unittitle: Consumer Economics and Housing (CEH) Course Syllabi - Spring
Policy Analysis and Management (PAM) Course Syllabi - Fall
PAM 220-"Introduction tom Management Principles and Differences Among Sectors"
Draft plans for the merger of HSS and CEH
Steering Committee-courses at Cornell that could support an Academic Plan for a merged dept. -family, consumer, health basics
Formation of PAM-Academic plans, correspondence, revision and adjustment, faculty meeting minutes
Graduate Merger Committee - Graduate School Organization
Series IV. Faculty Material: Meeting Minutes, Memos, Grants
Citations of the Work of Tenure Track Faculty in PAM
"Money 2000" - Statewide Financial Education Program, includes Fitness Workbook
Sr. Extension Associate Position - Jeanne Hogarth
Public Policy - Cornell Institute for Public Affairs
Public Policy - Cornell Institute for Public Affairs
Budget/ Planning Conference-items for discussion with Dean
